comment.text: This key translates the column header "Model" in a table displaying AI tools. It appears in the "ModelSettingsTable" component within the Portal Settings, specifically under "AI Tools," and represents the name of the AI model being configured. Translators should ensure this term accurately reflects the AI model being referenced.

usage.context:
const { t } = useTranslation(["Services"]);
 
 const defaultColumns = [
 {
 key: "Model",
 title: t("AIModel"),
 enable: true,
 resizable: true,
 default: true,
 active: true,
 minWidth: 240,
